products.name: Sony WH-1000XM5
products.description: The Sony WH-1000XM5 are the flagship noise-cancelling headphones from Sony, setting the industry benchmark for audio quality. With 8 microphones and AI-powered dual noise sensor technology, they block out everything around you.
features: Multipoint connection — connect two devices at once
Foldable design with premium carrying case

products.name: Apple MacBook Pro 14" M3
products.description: The MacBook Pro 14-inch with M3 chip delivers breakthrough performance for pros. With up to 18 hours of battery life, a stunning Liquid Retina XDR display, and the power of Apple Silicon, it handles everything from coding to 4K video editing.
features: MagSafe charging, HDMI, SD card slot

products.name: iPhone 15 Pro
products.description: iPhone 15 Pro features a titanium design, the A17 Pro chip — the most powerful chip ever in a smartphone — and a customizable Action button. With a 48MP main camera and USB-C, it's the ultimate pro device.
features: A17 Pro chip — fastest mobile processor

products.name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
products.description: The Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra brings Galaxy AI to your pocket. With a built-in S Pen, a 200MP camera, and a titanium frame, it's the most powerful Galaxy smartphone ever made.
features: Built-in S Pen with AI features

products.name: Sony PlayStation 5
products.description: Experience lightning-fast loading with an ultra-high speed SSD, deeper immersion with support for haptic feedback, and a new generation of incredible PlayStation games with the Sony PlayStation 5.
features: Custom AMD Zen 2 CPU, RDNA 2 GPU

products.name: Dell XPS 15
products.description: The Dell XPS 15 combines a stunning InfinityEdge display with powerful Intel Core i9 processing. Designed for creators and professionals, it features a premium aluminum chassis and all-day battery life.

products.name: LG C3 55" OLED TV
products.description: The LG C3 OLED TV delivers perfect blacks, infinite contrast, and over a billion colors. With the α9 Gen6 AI Processor 4K, it optimizes every scene for a breathtaking viewing experience.
features: 55-inch OLED evo panel with self-lit pixels
